task_completion.description: Log in to OpenSIS using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login as 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the course management or scheduling section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left navigation menu shows Scheduling or Courses selected, and the main pane displays course search or list options.

task_completion.description: Search for and locate the 'Introduction to Ceramics' (ART-205) course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The course list or search results display 'ART-205' or 'Introduction to Ceramics'.

task_completion.description: Open the details or edit mode for Section 01 of ART-205.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The section details or edit page for ART-205, Section 01 is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Update the enrollment capacity (Total Seats) to exactly 12.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An input field for 'Total Seats', 'Capacity', or 'Seats' contains the value '12'.
A confirmation message indicating the section was saved successfully, or the section list reflecting the updated 12 seats for ART-205 Section 01.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenSIS web interface rather than using terminal commands or database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the OpenSIS interface, not a terminal window executing SQL commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the control course (ART-101) or any other courses.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence in the screenshots of the agent opening or modifying ART-101. If visible in a list, its seat count remains 25.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show actual navigation through the OpenSIS menus, forms, and buttons, rather than a mocked-up text file or HTML edit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Course: ART-205 (Introduction to Ceramics). Target Section: 01. Target Seats: 12. Control Course: ART-101 (must remain at 25 seats). Credentials: Username 'admin', Password 'Admin@123'. The agent must use the OpenSIS web GUI to change the seat limit for ART-205 Section 01 to 12 without altering ART-101.
